_comment: An Experiment reviewed with --allow-experiments. The experiment implementation files are outside the pure WebExtension tree, so they are neither validated nor reported: the parent script's messenger.reloadMessage() (absent from the schema) is NOT flagged unknown-api and does not count toward permissions, and the files it loads at runtime (content/helper.js, modules/MyMod.sys.mjs) are not flagged unused (unused-files reports only junk for Experiments). A clean review.
